label: 🚀 Essential (All Devs)
description: Must-haves for every developer, regardless of stack

extensions.name: Prettier
extensions.description: Auto-formats your code on save. Works with JS, TS, CSS, HTML, JSON and more.

extensions.name: ESLint
extensions.description: Highlights JavaScript/TypeScript errors and bad patterns in real time.

extensions.name: GitLens
extensions.description: See who wrote each line of code, blame annotations, and rich Git history.

extensions.name: Git Graph
extensions.description: Visual git branch tree. See all commits, merges, and branches at a glance.

extensions.name: Path Intellisense
extensions.description: Autocompletes file paths as you type import statements.

extensions.name: Code Spell Checker
extensions.description: Catches spelling mistakes in your code and comments.

extensions.name: Error Lens
extensions.description: Shows errors and warnings inline, right next to the problematic code.

extensions.name: Auto Rename Tag
extensions.description: Automatically renames the matching HTML/JSX closing tag when you rename the opening one.

extensions.name: Better Comments
extensions.description: Color-codes your comments by type: TODO, warning, question, or regular note.

extensions.name: EditorConfig
extensions.description: Reads .editorconfig files and applies consistent formatting rules across your team.
